title: ipomoea subpeltata
intro: Ipomoea subpeltata, also known as the Naked Jewelweed or Spurred Jewelweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the morning glory family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ipomoea subpeltata include reducing inflammation, relieving itching and rashes, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a salve or ointment to apply topically, or used as a tincture or infusion for internal use.
